root_text.sn46.44:1.1: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn46.44:1.3: Kittāvatā nu kho, bhante, ‘duppañño eḷamūgo’ti vuccatī”ti?
root_text.sn46.44:1.4: “Sattannaṁ kho, bhikkhu, bojjhaṅgānaṁ abhāvitattā abahulīkatattā ‘duppañño eḷamūgo’ti vuccati.
root_text.sn46.44:1.7: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgānaṁ abhāvitattā abahulīkatattā ‘duppañño eḷamūgo’ti vuccatī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.44:1.1: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn46.44:1.3: How is a witless idiot defined?”
translation_text.sn46.44:1.4: “Mendicant, they’re called a witless idiot because they haven’t developed and cultivated the seven awakening factors.
translation_text.sn46.44:1.6: The awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.44:1.7: They’re called a witless idiot because they haven’t developed and cultivated these seven awakening factors.”
